  "analysis": "Accounting for d/roll.txt is bytes 0 for roll cases (epsilon, zeta). Period is also p0 everywhere; spec says period should be p1 for generated files under d/ when case has moved into later quota period. So c2.ItemsC likely computes size incorrectly for d/roll.txt (maybe stat failure treated as 0) and period logic maybe inverted or reset by rollup. We need to inspect internal/c2/roll.go and internal/c2/table.go (not yet shown due to screen truncation) plus cmd/ctl/main.go accountingMatchesDisk which probably catches the 0-byte mismatch causing ok=false in all cases (maybe because diskMatch is ANDed across source+restored and it fails for roll cases; but why alpha/beta/delta also ok=false suggests ok might be set incorrectly, or diskMatch is failing even without roll). Next: open these files fully and check their logic; fix bytes to actual file size via os.Stat and ensure period assignment per spec; also fix ok calculation if it's currently hardcoded false or missing digest/groups checks.",
